proposedPatches.description: Add a Prometheus compatibility overlay with normalized metadata, permissions, requirements, lifecycle, and resources.

manifest.name: gsap
manifest.description: GSAP animation reference for HyperFrames. Covers gsap.to(), from(), fromTo(), easing, stagger, defaults, timelines (gsap.timeline(), position parameter, labels, nesting, playback), and performance (transforms, will-change, quickTo). Use when writing GSAP animations in HyperFrames compositions.
